description: You are an OLPC volunteer coding instructor preparing a lesson on variables and mathematical patterns for 5th-grade students. Create a TurtleBlocks program that draws a growing rectangular spiral to demonstrate how a variable changes over time. The program must use a variable initialized to 10, a loop of 20 iterations, 90-degree turns, and an increment of 5 to the variable in each step. Save the completed program as 'growing_spiral.ta' to /home/ga/Documents/.
